source.scope: Official-source-backed Ecuador fiscal-year 2025 general-regime individual income-tax table currently filed in 2026.

EC.notes: General-regime tax caused under the official 2025 table on caller-confirmed taxable base before the personal-expense rebate. RIMPE, inheritance and special exemptions remain outside scope.

register.coverageSummary: Fiscal-year 2025 general-regime individual income tax on caller-confirmed taxable base before rebates and credits.
